message.lord_of_mysteries.guide.welcome: You received Investigator Notes and an Investigator's Compass. The M1 route begins by finding the camp and brewing the Seer potion.
message.lord_of_mysteries.guide.quick_st: Use the compass or /pm camp to locate the camp. Use /pm next at any time; /pm recover restores missing guide items.
message.lord_of_mysteries.guide.recovere: Restored %s missing starter item(s). Full inventories route them to the Ender Chest, then drop them at your feet if that is also full.
message.lord_of_mysteries.guide.recover_: Your Investigator Notes and Compass are already available.
message.lord_of_mysteries.guide.camp_fou: You reached the investigator camp. Check the supply barrel and clue chest, then use /pm next.
guide.lord_of_mysteries.next.title: — Current Story Step —
guide.lord_of_mysteries.next.find_camp: Use the Investigator's Compass and travel to the seed-determined camp. /pm camp repeats its direction, distance, and coordinates.
guide.lord_of_mysteries.next.brew_seer: Open the camp supply barrel for a crucible, spirit herb, and divination crystal; follow the notes to brew and drink the Sequence 9 Seer potion.
guide.lord_of_mysteries.next.digest_seer: Use Simple Divination and follow the Seer acting principles. Check /pm status and prepare the Clown potion at 100% digestion.
guide.lord_of_mysteries.next.brew_clown: Brew the Sequence 8 Clown potion from a deep-gray spirit tear, heather, and optional spirit alcohol. The server rejects premature advancement.
guide.lord_of_mysteries.next.digest_clow: Use Card Blades, Perfect Balance, Expression Control, and Intuitive Dodge until Sequence 8 reaches 100% digestion.
guide.lord_of_mysteries.next.hunt_serpen: Carry the camp's Spirit Lantern, reveal and defeat a Shapeshifter Serpent, and collect its gland for the Magician potion.
guide.lord_of_mysteries.next.brew_magici: Brew and drink the Sequence 7 Magician potion using a serpent gland, ash powder, and optional silver filings to finish M1.
guide.lord_of_mysteries.next.complete: The M1 Seer Sequence 9-7 slice is complete. Practice your abilities or use /pm mistcity to begin the M2 Mist City research content.
guide.lord_of_mysteries.next.other_pathw: This character is not on the M1 Seer route. Continue the current pathway, or use a fresh commoner survival character for M1 acceptance.
tooltip.lord_of_mysteries.investigator_n: Use for current goals; /pm handbook opens unlocked chapters
guide.lord_of_mysteries.handbook.title: — Occult Handbook Contents —
guide.lord_of_mysteries.handbook.hint: %s / %s chapters unlocked; use /pm handbook <1-9> to read.
guide.lord_of_mysteries.handbook.locked: This chapter remains covered by illegible ink.
guide.lord_of_mysteries.handbook.chapter: Keep light and an exit at night. Whispers are not orders; churches, camps, and full sleep are early anchors.
Find a credible formula, add ingredients in order, control heat, then digest the potion through acting.
Following sequence principles improves digestion; repetition decays and excess acting magnifies risk.
Chapter IV: Spirit, Pressure, and Pollution
Spirituality is ability fuel, pressure is short-term strain, and pollution is lasting erosion. Manage each separately.
Divination gives confidence-weighted clues, not certainty. Environment, pollution, and higher beings interfere.
Materials, array, environment, and host decide the outcome. Stop when the array breaks; never force completion.
M2 research: the Mist City outpost now has a board, agency ledger, lost-cat tutorial, and Missing Squad prologue. The full district, NPCs, and physical three-tier currency remain future work.
Bring your honorific, and your doubt.
The catalog lists 22 pathways. Only Seer 9-7 is in formal M1 acceptance; others open by milestone.
guide.lord_of_mysteries.title: — Investigator Field Guide —
guide.lord_of_mysteries.commoner.1: First: use the Investigator's Compass or /pm camp and travel to the seed-determined investigator camp.
guide.lord_of_mysteries.commoner.2: Second: take the crucible from the supply barrel; insert spirit herb, divination crystal, and optional moonwater in that order.
guide.lord_of_mysteries.commoner.3: Third: place the crucible over a lit campfire, empty-hand right-click to start, then retrieve and drink the finished Seer potion.
guide.lord_of_mysteries.seer.9: Sequence 9: V toggles Spirit Vision and B performs Simple Divination. Digest through readings and restraint.
guide.lord_of_mysteries.seer.8: Sequence 8: carry Mystic Playing Cards, practice dodges and performance; sneak-use villagers for Expression Control.
guide.lord_of_mysteries.seer.7: Sequence 7: enter with Flame Leap, land an Air Bullet, and keep paper and illusion as exits.
guide.lord_of_mysteries.seer.controls: Seer keys: R cards, Z Flame Leap, X substitute, C Air Bullet, M Stage Illusion.
guide.lord_of_mysteries.seer.ready: The current potion is fully digested; prepare the Sequence %s potion.
guide.lord_of_mysteries.seer.m1: You reached the M1 vertical-slice endpoint; finish Magician acting and the one-hour survival acceptance run.
guide.lord_of_mysteries.digestion: Current digestion is about %s%%; repeated actions provide diminishing returns.
guide.lord_of_mysteries.other_pathway: Your pathway has separate abilities. Press N for status and follow known acting entries.
guide.lord_of_mysteries.status_key: Press N at any time to review spirituality, digestion, pollution, and knowledge.

guide.lord_of_mysteries.commoner.4: Field safety: Spirit Lanterns reveal hidden threats; Calming Incense lowers pressure but adds pollution.
guide.lord_of_mysteries.commoner.5: Commands: /pm next shows the next story step, /pm recover restores guide items, and /pm mistcity opens M2 research after M1.
guide.lord_of_mysteries.field_rules: Rule of three: keep an escape route, a pressure remedy, and one unused dose of spirituality.
advancement.lord_of_mysteries.root.title: The Curtain Stirs
advancement.lord_of_mysteries.root.descr: Read the fragmentary notes and accept that knowledge has a price.
advancement.lord_of_mysteries.follow_the: Acquire an Investigator's Compass and seek the abandoned camp.
advancement.lord_of_mysteries.reach_inve: Reach the investigator camp and secure deterministic supplies for the first-hour route.
advancement.lord_of_mysteries.first_form: Brew a Sequence 9 Seer potion in the crucible.
advancement.lord_of_mysteries.become_see: Drink the Seer potion and enter the extraordinary world.
Carry a compass, Spirit Lantern, and Calming Incense together.
advancement.lord_of_mysteries.hunt_the_u: Kill a Shapeshifter Serpent and recover its potion material.
advancement.lord_of_mysteries.become_clo: Complete digestion and advance to Sequence 8 Clown.
advancement.lord_of_mysteries.m1_vertica: Advance to Sequence 7 and complete the M1 playable vertical slice.
A whisper finishes the sentence you had not yet spoken.
For one heartbeat, your shadow faces the wrong direction.
A bell rings somewhere beneath the stone.
The corner of your vision remembers a stranger.
message.lord_of_mysteries.insanity.moder: Something at the edge of sight has begun to count your steps.
The darkness answers with your own voice.
Your pulse no longer keeps the same rhythm as your heart.
An unseen audience waits for you to make a mistake.
message.lord_of_mysteries.insanity.sever: Reason fractures, and every shard reflects an open eye.
The curtain parts. You understand why it should remain closed.
Your name sounds like an invitation when the void repeats it.
The world leans closer, listening for your final thought.
command.lord_of_mysteries.rules.title: — Field Rules —
command.lord_of_mysteries.rules.1: Spirituality powers abilities and regenerates; exhausting it removes your safest option.
command.lord_of_mysteries.rules.2: Pollution is long-term corruption. At high values, breakdown becomes increasingly likely.
command.lord_of_mysteries.rules.3: Insanity pressure is immediate mental strain; artifacts, failed rituals, and spirits raise it.
command.lord_of_mysteries.rules.4: Potion digestion requires acting that matches the sequence. Repetition has diminishing returns.
command.lord_of_mysteries.rules.5: Every occult shortcut has a cost. Read tooltips, preserve an escape route, and prepare a remedy.
command.lord_of_mysteries.items.title: — Investigator Field Kit —
command.lord_of_mysteries.items.1: Investigator's Compass: locates the nearest camp; craft with a compass, paper, and amethyst.
command.lord_of_mysteries.items.2: Spirit Lantern: reveals hostile creatures; powered by spirituality or paid for with pressure.
command.lord_of_mysteries.items.3: Calming Incense: pressure -18 and pollution +2. It prevents panic, not consequences.
command.lord_of_mysteries.items.4: Spirit Salt: a purified reagent dropped by Spirit Wisps and used in field tools.
command.lord_of_mysteries.items.5: Ashen Thread: recovered from Ashen Puppets and used to bind a Spirit Lantern.
command.lord_of_mysteries.bestiary.title: — Preliminary Bestiary —
command.lord_of_mysteries.bestiary.1: Shapeshifter Serpent: invisible until close; a Spirit Lantern forces it visible for 10 seconds.
command.lord_of_mysteries.bestiary.2: Spirit Wisp: drains spirituality; Eternal Matchbox spirit flame deals double damage.
command.lord_of_mysteries.bestiary.3: Ashen Puppet: inflicts weakness and slowness, but water, rain, and bubbles erode it.
command.lord_of_mysteries.bestiary.4: Breakdown Body: a hostile residue created by recoverable loss of control.
tooltip.lord_of_mysteries.protective_cha: Automatically absorbs one severe insanity event
Single-use; does not prevent full breakdown at pollution 100
message.lord_of_mysteries.protective_cha: The charm burns to ash, sealing away a violent mental intrusion
message.lord_of_mysteries.rest.recovered: A full night's rest eases %s insanity pressure. Current pressure: %s
guide.lord_of_mysteries.recovery: Recovery: a full night's sleep lowers pressure by 20 once per day; a Protective Charm blocks one severe event.
command.lord_of_mysteries.items.6: Protective Charm: automatically consumes itself to block one severe insanity event.
command.lord_of_mysteries.items.7: Mist City Commission Board: right-click to accept a recommended case or settle completed work.
command.lord_of_mysteries.items.8: Commission papers and case clues: right-click to review status or record occult evidence.
command.lord_of_mysteries.items.9: Press Card: proof of the reporter rescue; escort her to the outpost and prepare for the night assault.

pathway.lord_of_mysteries.reader.descrip: Learning, reasoning, appraisal, and knowledge reuse.

Occult knowledge, witchcraft, scrolls, and astrology.
pathway.lord_of_mysteries.monster.descri: Luck, misfortune, probability, and fate fluctuation; a distant route.

knowledge.lord_of_mysteries.thief_9_acti: Acting Principle: choose targets and risk instead of obeying blind greed
knowledge.lord_of_mysteries.apprentice_9: Acting Principle: record, understand, and keep knowledge moving
advancement.lord_of_mysteries.become_thi: Drink the Thief potion and enter the M2 low-sequence research slice.
advancement.lord_of_mysteries.become_app: Drink the Apprentice potion and enter the M2 low-sequence research slice.
guide.lord_of_mysteries.spectator.9: Spectator 9: G reads emotions; Behavior Prediction reduces one incoming hit every 8 seconds.
guide.lord_of_mysteries.spectator.8: Telepathist 8: H reads surface intent; J applies a resistible Mental Suggestion.
guide.lord_of_mysteries.spectator.7: Psychiatrist 7: Y pacifies a crowd, U interrupts one mind, and sneaking sustains Psychological Cloak.
guide.lord_of_mysteries.hunter.9: Hunter 9: attack to track prey, deploy snares, and follow outdoor threat hints.
guide.lord_of_mysteries.hunter.8: Provoker 8: K provokes a crowd, L enrages one target, and Battle Will protects you when surrounded.
guide.lord_of_mysteries.hunter.7: Pyromaniac 7: Y casts Flame Spear, U releases a Fire Ring, and Fire Affinity protects you from flame.
guide.lord_of_mysteries.thief.9: Thief 9: Y pilfers, sneaking sustains Shadow Step, and U performs an emergency retreat.
guide.lord_of_mysteries.apprentice.9: Apprentice 9: V opens Spiritual Sight, Y moves a nearby drop, and U creates a Knowledge Copy.
guide.lord_of_mysteries.m2.controls: All M2 active abilities are server-authoritative; cooldowns, PvP permissions, range, and spirituality are checked again on the server.
message.lord_of_mysteries.pyromaniac.fir: Fire Ring struck and repelled %s targets
advancement.lord_of_mysteries.become_psy: Fully digest Telepathist and advance to Sequence 7 Psychiatrist.
advancement.lord_of_mysteries.become_pyr: Fully digest Provoker and advance to Sequence 7 Pyromaniac.
advancement.lord_of_mysteries.warded_min: Prepare a Protective Charm before the whispers become a scream.
guide.lord_of_mysteries.thief.8: Swindler 8: Y swaps with a visible target and U leaves a decoy escape; sneak+Y/U uses Sequence 9 abilities.
guide.lord_of_mysteries.thief.7: Cryptologist 7: Y analyzes block runes; U opens a targeted lock or erases pursuit. Sneak uses Sequence 8 and sprint uses Sequence 9.
guide.lord_of_mysteries.apprentice.8: Trickmaster 8: Y relocates a small target; hold a Knowledge Copy+Y to link knowledge; U opens a Mirror Door. Sneak uses Sequence 9.
guide.lord_of_mysteries.apprentice.7: Astrologer 7: use Y under the open night sky for an omen and U for Starlight Ward. Sneak uses Sequence 8 and sprint uses Sequence 9.
guide.lord_of_mysteries.m2.controls.adva: Ability layers: normal keys use the current sequence; at Sequence 7 sneak+Y/U uses Sequence 8 and sprint+Y/U uses Sequence 9.
message.lord_of_mysteries.swindler.swap_: The swap target is out of range, obstructed, or disallowed by PvP rules
message.lord_of_mysteries.swindler.decoy: Decoy Escape broke pursuit from %s enemies
message.lord_of_mysteries.cryptologist.r: Rune Analysis complete: %s distinct traces recorded
message.lord_of_mysteries.cryptologist.l: Master Lockpick opened the mechanism without a sound
message.lord_of_mysteries.cryptologist.e: Trace Erasure disrupted nearby pursuit and spiritual residue
message.lord_of_mysteries.trickmaster.no: Space trick failed: no safe destination was available
message.lord_of_mysteries.trickmaster.re: Spatial Relay moved %s to a new position
message.lord_of_mysteries.trickmaster.li: Knowledge Link requires at least two known entries
Knowledge Link succeeded and revealed a new formula clue
Knowledge Link conflicted and added 5 mental pressure
message.lord_of_mysteries.trickmaster.mi: A Mirror Door briefly folded two points together
message.lord_of_mysteries.astrologer.sky: Stellar Divination requires the open night sky
message.lord_of_mysteries.astrologer.for: Stellar omen: a material clue in the east will sharpen after dawn
Stellar omen: combat risk is gathering in the south
Stellar omen: a knowledge trace in the west merits investigation
Stellar omen: spirit activity in the north will strengthen at night
knowledge.lord_of_mysteries.cryptologist: Decoded Record: Shared Structure of Ancient Runes
knowledge.lord_of_mysteries.apprentice.l: Derived Clue: The Hidden Formula between Two Records
advancement.lord_of_mysteries.become_swi: Fully digest Thief and advance to Sequence 8 Swindler.
advancement.lord_of_mysteries.become_cry: Fully digest Swindler and advance to Sequence 7 Cryptologist.
advancement.lord_of_mysteries.become_tri: A Door Folded in the Palm
Fully digest Apprentice and advance to Sequence 8 Trickmaster.
advancement.lord_of_mysteries.become_ast: Fully digest Trickmaster and advance to Sequence 7 Astrologer.
tooltip.lord_of_mysteries.commission_pap: Right-click to review the current commission, step, and account balance
tooltip.lord_of_mysteries.bloodstained_n: The squad's final notes; right-click to record them in the handbook
tooltip.lord_of_mysteries.press_card: Mud and blood stain its edge; proof that the reporter survived
tooltip.lord_of_mysteries.burnt_list: Only a few charred surnames remain, pointing toward the unopened second chain
commission.lord_of_mysteries.lost_cat.su: Follow the outpost lead to an investigator camp and find the press office cat.
commission.lord_of_mysteries.missing_squ: The Missing Investigation Squad: Act One
Trace the squad, search the church, rescue the reporter, and hold through three waves.
quest.lord_of_mysteries.lost_cat.title: Lost Soot
quest.lord_of_mysteries.lost_cat.step.ac: Take the missing-cat notice from the Mist City board.
quest.lord_of_mysteries.lost_cat.step.ou: Read the press office instructions at the outpost.
quest.lord_of_mysteries.lost_cat.step.ca: Use /pm camp and reach the nearest abandoned investigator camp.
Find the cat named Soot near the camp and approach it.
quest.lord_of_mysteries.lost_cat.step.re: Return to the outpost and right-click the board to settle.
quest.lord_of_mysteries.missing_squad.ti: The Missing Investigation Squad: Act One
quest.lord_of_mysteries.missing_squad.st: Take the press commission for the missing squad.
Confirm the squad's last departure record at the outpost.
Reach the abandoned camp and confirm their last stop.
Search the camp and recover the bloodstained notes.
Reach Sequence 9 on any launch pathway before continuing.
Defeat three special occult creatures or breakdown entities.
Show the evidence to the Nighthawk contact and secure permission to continue.
Use /pm case to locate and search the abandoned church.
Follow the lead to the cultist rescue camp.
Use /pm commission approach to choose assault, stealth, or divination, then rescue Erin.
Escort Erin to the outpost; she catches up if left too far behind.
Wait for night at the outpost and defeat three waves of pursuers.
Speak to the Nighthawk contact for payment and the burnt list.
command.lord_of_mysteries.commission.dat: Commission data is not loaded yet; wait for the server resource reload.
command.lord_of_mysteries.commission.lis: Use /pm commission accept <id>, or right-click the board for the recommended case.
command.lord_of_mysteries.commission.cha: The linked quest chain is unavailable, so acceptance was blocked.
command.lord_of_mysteries.commission.alr: You already have an active commission.
This one-time commission is already complete.
command.lord_of_mysteries.commission.coo: The agency has not cleared this commission for you again.
command.lord_of_mysteries.commission.non: No active commission. Use /pm commission list to browse.
command.lord_of_mysteries.commission.aba: The current commission was abandoned; unfinished work earns no reward.
command.lord_of_mysteries.quest.return_t: All objectives are complete; return to the designated board or contact to settle.
command.lord_of_mysteries.quest.evidence: You found bloodstained investigation notes beneath the camp debris.
message.lord_of_mysteries.mist_city.outp: Mist City outpost: %s, about %s blocks away (X %s, Z %s)
The uncharted Mist City outpost should be %s, about %s blocks away (X %s, Z %s)
message.lord_of_mysteries.case.church: Abandoned church: %s, about %s blocks away (X %s, Z %s)
message.lord_of_mysteries.case.cultist_c: Cultist rescue camp: %s, about %s blocks away (X %s, Z %s)
message.lord_of_mysteries.npc.press_cler: The clerk lowers their voice: verify the departure record, and trust no unsigned formula.
message.lord_of_mysteries.npc.nighthawk_: The contact checks your evidence and writes the next coordinates on its back.
message.lord_of_mysteries.npc.reporter_n: The reporter backs away; you have not uncovered enough evidence to rescue her safely.
message.lord_of_mysteries.npc.reporter_r: Erin gives you her press card and agrees to follow you back to the outpost.
message.lord_of_mysteries.quest.escort_c: Erin reached the outpost. Her pursuers will attack after nightfall.
message.lord_of_mysteries.quest.wait_for: The assault has not begun. Remain near the outpost and wait for nightfall.
knowledge.lord_of_mysteries.m2.missing_s: Case File: Burnt List and Chain Two Lead
advancement.lord_of_mysteries.take_first: Accept your first Mist City investigation commission.
advancement.lord_of_mysteries.rescue_rep: Rescue the missing squad's surviving reporter from the cultist camp.
advancement.lord_of_mysteries.finish_mis: Escort the reporter, hold the night assault, and finish Act One of The Missing Investigation Squad.
tooltip.lord_of_mysteries.sealed_formula: Use spiritual inspection or reagents; no verdict has been formed
Three traces checked; use /pm formula verdict to submit a judgment
commission.lord_of_mysteries.counterfeit: Visit the occultist hut and authenticate a potentially lethal sealed formula.
quest.lord_of_mysteries.counterfeit_form: Use /pm case to locate and enter the occultist hut.
Speak with the occult appraiser inside the hut.
Receive the sealed formula dossier from the appraiser.
Use the dossier; Seers spend 6 spirituality, while others use a crystal and mystic ink.
Use the three clues, then run /pm formula verdict authentic or forged.
Return the judged dossier to the occult appraiser.
command.lord_of_mysteries.commission.pre: A prerequisite commission is incomplete, so the agency withheld this case.
message.lord_of_mysteries.case.occultist: Occultist hut: %s, about %s blocks away (X %s, Z %s)
message.lord_of_mysteries.npc.occult_app: Morel slides over a wax-sealed dossier: paper, ink, and ingredient order can all lie.
message.lord_of_mysteries.formula.dossie: You received the sealed dossier; Morel replaces it if it is lost.
message.lord_of_mysteries.formula.no_dos: You do not have a sealed formula dossier.
message.lord_of_mysteries.formula.wrong_: The current case step does not allow this dossier to be inspected or submitted.
message.lord_of_mysteries.formula.missin: Requires a Sequence 9+ Seer with 6 spirituality, or both a divination crystal and mystic ink.
message.lord_of_mysteries.formula.method: Your spirituality touches the dossier and exposes its contradictions.
The mystic ink is consumed as the crystal refracts hidden traces.
message.lord_of_mysteries.formula.not_ap: Use the dossier first to complete all three appraisal checks.
message.lord_of_mysteries.formula.verdic: The conclusion contradicts the evidence, adding 8 loss-of-control pressure; you may judge again.
All three consistent means authentic; any anomaly means forged.
message.lord_of_mysteries.formula.clue.w: The paper watermark matches the agency batch record.
The watermark was pressed after printing and its edge direction is reversed.
message.lord_of_mysteries.formula.clue.i: The mystic ink decay matches the claimed writing date.
Fresh surface ink conceals an older erased spiritual layer.
message.lord_of_mysteries.formula.clue.s: The principal and supplementary ingredient order is stable.
The ingredient order would trigger cross-contamination during heating.
message.lord_of_mysteries.quest.approach: Choose a rescue route first: /pm commission approach assault|stealth|divination.
A route can only be selected during the reporter rescue step.
Return to the cultist rescue camp before locking a route.
This investigation is locked to the %s route; abandoning resets it.
Stealth requires a Sequence 9 or higher Thief or Apprentice.
Divination requires a Sequence 9 or higher Seer and 12 spirituality.
The %s route is locked and synchronized to online party members.
%s ritual guards remain on the assault route.
command.lord_of_mysteries.party.no_team: You are not in a scoreboard team, so no shared investigation ledger is available.
command.lord_of_mysteries.party.none: This team has no shared investigation to recover.
command.lord_of_mysteries.party.data_una: The datapack definition referenced by this shared investigation is unavailable.
command.lord_of_mysteries.party.invalid_: This scoreboard team has %s entries but the quest limit is %s; adjust the team first.
command.lord_of_mysteries.party.conflict: Another commission is already active and cannot be overwritten by party progress.
command.lord_of_mysteries.party.already_: You have already settled this party commission.
command.lord_of_mysteries.party.prerequi: You have not completed the prerequisite cases for this party commission.
command.lord_of_mysteries.party.full: The shared investigation ledger has reached its %s-player limit.
command.lord_of_mysteries.party.already_: Your investigation already matches the party ledger.
command.lord_of_mysteries.party.sync_suc: Joined and synchronized the party investigation: %s.
command.lord_of_mysteries.party.catchup: Recovered investigation progress made while you were offline from the persistent party ledger.
command.lord_of_mysteries.party.members: Online pending %s · pending settlement %s · registered members %s/%s
command.lord_of_mysteries.party.join_hin: Run /pm party sync to join and catch up to the team's latest progress.
